Class 3 envelope (Atom 1 = Class 2 schema; Atom 2 = Class 3 dispatch wire; Atom 6 = Class 3 dual audit Codex + Gemini both ✓). Self-audit PASS; Codex CHALLENGE × 2 (Q4 doc-drift on 4-vs-5-holding total_supply; Q5 legacy CPMM in src/prediction_market.rs predates TB-12) — both resolved as documentation/scope clarifications via recursive audit §10 + OBS_TB_12_LEGACY_CPMM_QUARANTINE_2026-05-03.md (TB-13 prerequisite); Gemini round-1 PASS / high conviction / PROCEED to SHIP (gemini-2.5-pro, 896k char prompt, 48.2s API; 8/8 audit questions PASS). User-architect ultrathink verified architect §9 strict alignment before SHIP — found 4 SG-12.x test-name drifts (SG-12.5 / 12.6 / 12.7 / 12.8 names didn't exactly match architect's "passes" strings); all 4 fixed BEFORE SHIP per feedback_no_retroactive_evidence_rewrite (NOT post-ship patch): SG-12.5 renamed to sg_12_5_replay_reconstructs_node_positions; SG-12.6 ADDED sg_12_6_dashboard_view_positions_works inside src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs #[cfg(test)] mod tb12_render_tests with 4 cases + forbidden-token grep; SG-12.7 renamed to sg_12_7_no_market_trading_variants_introduced; SG-12.8 ADDED sg_12_8_no_node_market_entry_as_canonical_state at integration-test level (q_state.rs unit alias kept as defense-in-depth). 8/8 SG-12.x by architect §9.3 EXACT names PASS. cargo test --workspace = 759/0/150 (+12 net vs TB-11 ship 747; +28 vs TB-10 ship 731). Architectural deltas: NEW src/state/typed_tx.rs (NodePosition struct + PositionSide enum + PositionKind enum); EXTEND src/state/q_state.rs (NodePositionsIndex flat shape + EconomicState 10→11 sub-fields with +node_positions_t serde-default); EXTEND src/state/sequencer.rs (WorkTx + ChallengeTx accept-arm pure-additive NodePosition write — no balances_t / stakes_t / challenge_cases_t / total_supply mutation; CR-12.1 + CR-12.2 verified); EXTEND src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs (NodePosition NOT in 4-holding total_supply_micro; structural — assert_total_ctf_conserved unchanged); EXTEND src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs (§13 Node exposure records + render_section_13 pure-fn helper for SG-12.6 unit-testability + LABEL DISCIPLINE "exposure records" NOT "Open market balances" per architect §8 Atom 4); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (TB-11 G3/G4 carry-forward — 4 EvidenceCapsule counters + write_evidence_capsule + tb11_emit_terminal_summary_for_run wired at MAX_TX exhausted exit point); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/lean_market.rs (3 new subcommands: tick POLICY PREVIEW MODE — actual emission deferred to system_keypair persistence + view-bankruptcy read-only listing + view-positions read-only NodePosition browser); REHASH genesis_payload.toml trust_root for src/state/sequencer.rs + src/state/typed_tx.rs + src/state/q_state.rs + src/state/mod.rs + src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs + experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (lean_market.rs outside trust root by TB-10 precedent). Halting triggers (architect §7) NONE triggered: CTF conservation passes (Gemini Q1+Q4); position-tx field derivation exact (position_fields_derived_from_source_tx_exactly test PASS); NodePosition NOT counted as Coin (4-holding model unchanged); replay deterministic (sg_12_5 PASS); no Codex/Gemini VETO. Production claim: "TB-12 establishes a flat, immutable, non-monetary NodePositionsIndex anchoring WorkTx.stake → FirstLong + ChallengeTx.stake → ChallengeShort exposure records on canonical L4-derived QState. NodePosition is exposure record NOT active position balance per architect §10 critical insight; TB-13 CompleteSet introduces real YES/NO claims; TB-14 PriceIndex computes price from long/short interest; TB-16 controlled-arena introduces P&L. Charter Q6 (ii.5) sync mode honored — dual audit complete + user-architect ultrathink verdict before SHIP." Open follow-ups (carry-forward, NOT ship blockers): TB-13 prerequisite quarantine of src/prediction_market.rs legacy f64 CPMM (OBS-tracked); system_keypair persistence + reattachment factory for lean_market tick on-chain emission; real-LLM zeta-regularization rerun (Atom 0.5(a) wired the call site; manual user-driven session post-ship).

Q-projection deterministic from typed-tx fields with no env input) + Art.I.1 (5-step compile loop: accept-side derives exposure record additively; predicate outcome unchanged) + Art.III.4 (no fake accepted preserved — NodePosition is sequencer-derived, not agent-claimed; handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:13930:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R3.md:5625:    13	- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:13931:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R3.md:5626:    14	- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:13936:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R3.md:7413:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:14:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:13940:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_15_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R1.md:3948:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:26:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:13941:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_15_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R1.md:3949:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:27:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:13956:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_15_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R1.md:6117:    cargo test --workspace --test tb_15_halt_triggers: 1/6 PASS (#3 green;
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:13957:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_15_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-04_R1.md:6448:handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:45:# 2026-05-03 TB-15 SHIPPED — "P4 Information Loom (primary) + P5 MetaTape v0 prep: Lamarckian Autopsy + Markov EvidenceCapsule per architect 2026-05-02 + 2026-05-03 §6 verbatim spec (FR-15.1..6 + CR-15.1..6 + SG-15.1..8 + 6 halt triggers + forbidden list)". Class 2 envelope (self-audit; AgentVisibleProjection unchanged; only one new sequencer dispatch hook — TaskBankruptcyTx Step 3.5 + apply_one Stage 3.5). 7-atom plan (charter + halt fixture + AgentAutopsyCapsule schema/writer + AutopsyIndex/TaskBankruptcyTx wire-in + cluster_autopsies + MarkovEvidenceCapsule schema/generator + dashboard §15/first capsule/SHIP) all green. Auto-resolutions per feedback_architect_deviation_stance: A) single trigger site = TaskBankruptcyTx (SlashTx wires when RSP-3.2 ships; FinalizeReward loser branch wires when RSP-4 ships); B) EconomicState 12→13 sub-fields with +agent_autopsies_t serde-default; C) privacy default = AuditOnly (re-use TB-11 CapsulePrivacyPolicy); D) clustering threshold N=3 per architect §3.2.3 verbatim; E) LossReasonClass 8 variants incl Other(String); F) Markov override = env TURINGOS_MARKOV_OVERRIDE=1; G) OBS_RESOLUTIONS_INDEX_TB15 DEFERRED out of TB-15 (TB-13 audit residue, not in architect §6 spec); H) Class 2 self-audit (no AgentVisibleProjection mod). cargo test --workspace = 870/0/150 PASS (+67 net vs TB-14 ship 803). All 6 halt-triggers GREEN: #1 raw_logs_not_in_general_read_view (Atom 3 file-scan AgentVisibleProjection) + #2 markov_capsule_references_constitution_hash (Atom 5 SG-15.7) + #3 autopsy_does_not_mutate_predicates (Atom 2 file-scan no &mut PredicateRegistry/ToolRegistry/RiskPolicyRegistry/register_*/unregister_*/patch_*; CR-15.3 + SG-15.8) + #4 private_detail_not_in_other_agent_view (Atom 3 file-scan AutopsyIndex value type Vec<Cid> not raw bytes; SG-15.2) + #5 typical_error_clustering_uses_summary_only (Atom 4 cluster_autopsies serialization scan no private_detail_cid byte run; CR-15.2 + SG-15.5) + #6 deep_history_read_without_override_fails (Atom 5 try_deep_history_read_with_override_check default-deny; SG-15.4 + FR-15.5). Architectural deltas: NEW src/runtime/autopsy_capsule.rs (LossReasonClass enum + AgentAutopsyCapsule struct + format_public_summary + write_autopsy_capsule + derive_autopsies_for_bankruptcy PURE deterministic helper + write_bankruptcy_autopsies_to_cas + cluster_autopsies + TypicalErrorSummary + AutopsyWriteError + 15 unit tests); NEW src/runtime/markov_capsule.rs (ObsId newtype + MarkovEvidenceCapsule struct + with_constitution_hash + try_deep_history_read_with_override_check + override_set_from_env + write_markov_capsule + scan_unresolved_obs + sha256_of_file + MarkovGenError + 8 unit tests); NEW src/bin/generate_markov_capsule.rs (CLI binary with --tb-id/--out-dir/--constitution-path/--cas-dir/--prev-cid-hex/--alignment-dir/--no-cas args + TURINGOS_MARKOV_OVERRIDE env); NEW tests/tb_15_halt_triggers.rs (6 fixtures); MOD src/state/typed_tx.rs (+RiskRuleId opaque newtype); MOD src/bottom_white/cas/schema.rs (+4 ObjectType variants AgentAutopsyCapsule + AutopsyPrivateDetail + MarkovEvidenceCapsule + NextSessionContext); MOD src/state/q_state.rs (+AutopsyIndex(BTreeMap<EventId, Vec<Cid>>) newtype + agent_autopsies_t 13th sub-field on EconomicState serde-default; sub-field count assertion 12→13); MOD src/state/sequencer.rs (TaskBankruptcyTx dispatch arm Step 3.5 PURE deterministic Cid derivation + apply_one Stage 3.5 CAS write side-effect via deterministic helper; NO predicate registry mutation; NO AgentVisibleProjection mod; NO change to monetary invariants); MOD src/runtime/mod.rs (+pub mod autopsy_capsule + pub mod markov_capsule); MOD src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs (+render_section_15 pure render with AUTOPSY IS PRIVATE banner + autopsy_event_counts + latest_markov_capsule_cid_hex fields on DashboardReport + read_latest_markov_pointer helper + 4 SG-15.6 dashboard render tests); MOD 4 test fixtures sub-field count 12→13 (economic_state_reconstruct/q_state_reconstruct/six_axioms_alignment); MOD tests/fc_alignment_conformance.rs (+4 TB-15 witnesses FC1-N32 write_autopsy_capsule + FC1-N33 derive_autopsies_for_bankruptcy + FC2-N30 cluster_autopsies + FC3-N43 MarkovEvidenceCapsule); REHASH genesis_payload.toml trust_root for 6 modified files (src/runtime/mod.rs ×2 hops Atom2→Atom5; src/state/q_state.rs Atom3; src/state/typed_tx.rs Atom2; src/state/sequencer.rs Atom3; src/bottom_white/cas/schema.rs Atom2; tests/fc_alignment_conformance.rs Atom6). First Markov capsule emitted (capsule_id b244f16a1f3bd532d041a40fe39b2b7e7cc12fb58e18b61aedd76a8010eeb1b6) with constitution_hash eec695459c71fbef3685583485deb431fe3b561657b2f285b7c5e7e220e59e03; evidence at handover/evidence/tb_15_markov_capsule_2026-05-03/. Production claim: "TB-15 establishes Lamarckian Autopsy + Markov EvidenceCapsule substrate. AgentAutopsyCapsule (per-agent, per-event, AuditOnly) records loss/bankruptcy events derived deterministically from ChainTape evidence — NEVER LLM self-narration. agent_autopsies_t lives sequencer-side (NOT projected to AgentVisibleProjection per CR-15.1 + halt-trigger #1). TypicalErrorBroadcast clustering at N≥3 emits public_summary text + Cids only — NEVER private_detail_cid bytes. MarkovEvidenceCapsule binds constitution_hash + L4 + L4.E + CAS roots + previous capsule + typical_errors + unresolved_obs as next-session bootstrap default; deeper history requires TURINGOS_MARKOV_OVERRIDE=1. CR-15.3/15.4 STRUCTURALLY ENFORCED via writer signature + halt-trigger #3 file-scan. Constitutional alignment: Art.II.1 + Art.III.1 + Art.III.2 + Art.III.3 + Art.III.4 + Art.V.1 + Art.0.2." Open follow-ups (carry-forward NOT ship blockers): multi-site autopsy wire-in (SlashLoss/ChallengeUnsuccessful/VerifierBondLost — when RSP-3.2/RSP-4 ship); L4/L4.E/CAS root chain-readers in Markov generator (currently zero placeholders); CAS-walking dashboard §15 (currently empty autopsy_event_counts); InitAI agent-side honoring of Markov default (P5 v1); OBS_RESOLUTIONS_INDEX_TB15 explicitly deferred per charter §7-G.
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:13965:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:3676:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R4.md:2973:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R3.md:2385:handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:39:# 2026-05-03 TB-12 SHIPPED — "P3 carry-forward + P4 primary: Node Exposure Index per architect 2026-05-03 ruling §3 + §10". Class 3 envelope (Atom 1 = Class 2 schema; Atom 2 = Class 3 dispatch wire; Atom 6 = Class 3 dual audit Codex + Gemini both ✓). Self-audit PASS; Codex CHALLENGE × 2 (Q4 doc-drift on 4-vs-5-holding total_supply; Q5 legacy CPMM in src/prediction_market.rs predates TB-12) — both resolved as documentation/scope clarifications via recursive audit §10 + OBS_TB_12_LEGACY_CPMM_QUARANTINE_2026-05-03.md (TB-13 prerequisite); Gemini round-1 PASS / high conviction / PROCEED to SHIP (gemini-2.5-pro, 896k char prompt, 48.2s API; 8/8 audit questions PASS). User-architect ultrathink verified architect §9 strict alignment before SHIP — found 4 SG-12.x test-name drifts (SG-12.5 / 12.6 / 12.7 / 12.8 names didn't exactly match architect's "passes" strings); all 4 fixed BEFORE SHIP per feedback_no_retroactive_evidence_rewrite (NOT post-ship patch): SG-12.5 renamed to sg_12_5_replay_reconstructs_node_positions; SG-12.6 ADDED sg_12_6_dashboard_view_positions_works inside src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs #[cfg(test)] mod tb12_render_tests with 4 cases + forbidden-token grep; SG-12.7 renamed to sg_12_7_no_market_trading_variants_introduced; SG-12.8 ADDED sg_12_8_no_node_market_entry_as_canonical_state at integration-test level (q_state.rs unit alias kept as defense-in-depth). 8/8 SG-12.x by architect §9.3 EXACT names PASS. cargo test --workspace = 759/0/150 (+12 net vs TB-11 ship 747; +28 vs TB-10 ship 731). Architectural deltas: NEW src/state/typed_tx.rs (NodePosition struct + PositionSide enum + PositionKind enum); EXTEND src/state/q_state.rs (NodePositionsIndex flat shape + EconomicState 10→11 sub-fields with +node_positions_t serde-default); EXTEND src/state/sequencer.rs (WorkTx + ChallengeTx accept-arm pure-additive NodePosition write — no balances_t / stakes_t / challenge_cases_t / total_supply mutation; CR-12.1 + CR-12.2 verified); EXTEND src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs (NodePosition NOT in 4-holding total_supply_micro; structural — assert_total_ctf_conserved unchanged); EXTEND src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs (§13 Node exposure records + render_section_13 pure-fn helper for SG-12.6 unit-testability + LABEL DISCIPLINE "exposure records" NOT "Open market balances" per architect §8 Atom 4); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (TB-11 G3/G4 carry-forward — 4 EvidenceCapsule counters + write_evidence_capsule + tb11_emit_terminal_summary_for_run wired at MAX_TX exhausted exit point); EXTEND experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/lean_market.rs (3 new subcommands: tick POLICY PREVIEW MODE — actual emission deferred to system_keypair persistence + view-bankruptcy read-only listing + view-positions read-only NodePosition browser); REHASH genesis_payload.toml trust_root for src/state/sequencer.rs + src/state/typed_tx.rs + src/state/q_state.rs + src/state/mod.rs + src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs + experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs (lean_market.rs outside trust root by TB-10 precedent). Halting triggers (architect §7) NONE triggered: CTF conservation passes (Gemini Q1+Q4); position-tx field derivation exact (position_fields_derived_from_source_tx_exactly test PASS); NodePosition NOT counted as Coin (4-holding model unchanged); replay deterministic (sg_12_5 PASS); no Codex/Gemini VETO. Production claim: "TB-12 establishes a flat, immutable, non-monetary NodePositionsIndex anchoring WorkTx.stake → FirstLong + ChallengeTx.stake → ChallengeShort exposure records on canonical L4-derived QState. NodePosition is exposure record NOT active position balance per architect §10 critical insight; TB-13 CompleteSet introduces real YES/NO claims; TB-14 PriceIndex computes price from long/short interest; TB-16 controlled-arena introduces P&L. Charter Q6 (ii.5) sync mode honored — dual audit complete + user-architect ultrathink verdict before SHIP." Open follow-ups (carry-forward, NOT ship blockers): TB-13 prerequisite quarantine of src/prediction_market.rs legacy f64 CPMM (OBS-tracked); system_keypair persistence + reattachment factory for lean_market tick on-chain emission; real-LLM zeta-regularization rerun (Atom 0.5(a) wired the call site; manual user-driven session post-ship).

Charter Q6 (ii.5) sync mode honored — dual audit complete + user-architect ultrathink verdict before SHIP." Open follow-ups (carry-forward, NOT ship blockers): TB-13 prerequisite quarantine of src/prediction_market.rs legacy f64 CPMM (OBS-tracked); system_keypair persistence + reattachment factory for lean_market tick on-chain emission; real-LLM zeta-regularization rerun (Atom 0.5(a) wired the call site; manual user-driven session post-ship).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:13967:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:4373:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R4.md:12766:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:88:- **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1, hardened by A8e3 H6): `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` — Rust integration test that shells to `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` + asserts exit 0 + checks for the unittest "OK" trailer. Now exercised on every `cargo test --workspace` (PASS in A8e2/A8e3 verification). The Python suite is no longer "manual only" — it runs whenever the Rust tests run, which is every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. **A8e3 H6 fail-closed**: missing `python3` is now a hard test failure (not a soft skip — Codex R3#3 caught the silent-pass risk). Explicit opt-out only via `SKIP_LLM_PROXY_PYTHON_CONFORMANCE=1` and the bypass is logged loudly. Closes the round-2 "recurring conformance gate" finding.

handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:13980:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:4600:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:12859:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:21:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:13981:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:4601:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:12860:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:22:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:13984:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5118:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:193:- (Q4.a) Spot-check: re-run `cargo test --workspace`; expect 265 PASS / 29 ignored / 0 failed.

(A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:13994:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5266:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:7744:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:7897:    15	- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).

handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14007:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5335:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:8681:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R7.md:5277:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14008:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5336:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:8682:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R7.md:5278:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14009:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5339:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:8693:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R7.md:5731:   156	- (Q4.a) Spot-check: re-run `cargo test --workspace`; expect 265 PASS / 29 ignored / 0 failed.

Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).

handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14012:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5356:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:8941:handover/audits/A8_EXIT_PACKET_2026-04-26.md:153:- (Q4.a) Spot-check: re-run `cargo test --workspace`; expect 265 PASS / 29 ignored / 0 failed.
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14013:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5363:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:8950:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:88:- **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1, hardened by A8e3 H6): `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` — Rust integration test that shells to `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` + asserts exit 0 + checks for the unittest "OK" trailer. Now exercised on every `cargo test --workspace` (PASS in A8e2/A8e3 verification). The Python suite is no longer "manual only" — it runs whenever the Rust tests run, which is every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. **A8e3 H6 fail-closed**: missing `python3` is now a hard test failure (not a soft skip — Codex R3#3 caught the silent-pass risk). Explicit opt-out only via `SKIP_LLM_PROXY_PYTHON_CONFORMANCE=1` and the bypass is logged loudly. Closes the round-2 "recurring conformance gate" finding.

(A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14023:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5568:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:9155:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:5788:    48	- **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1, hardened by A8e3 H6): `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` — Rust integration test that shells to `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` + asserts exit 0 + checks for the unittest "OK" trailer. Now exercised on every `cargo test --workspace` (PASS in A8e2/A8e3 verification). The Python suite is no longer "manual only" — it runs whenever the Rust tests run, which is every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. **A8e3 H6 fail-closed**: missing `python3` is now a hard test failure (not a soft skip — Codex R3#3 caught the silent-pass risk). Explicit opt-out only via `SKIP_LLM_PROXY_PYTHON_CONFORMANCE=1` and the bypass is logged loudly. Closes the round-2 "recurring conformance gate" finding.
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14024:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5614:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:9201:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R4.md:7660:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:14:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).

(A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14035:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5724:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:10740:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:193:- (Q4.a) Spot-check: re-run `cargo test --workspace`; expect 265 PASS / 29 ignored / 0 failed.
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14036:handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R5.md:5735:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:10932:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:5437:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).

handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14087:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R11.md:6829:    23	- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14088:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R11.md:6830:    24	- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14184:handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_13_ROUND2_AUDIT_2026-04-29.md:4688:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R7.md:196:- (Q4.a) Spot-check: re-run `cargo test --workspace`; expect 265 PASS / 29 ignored / 0 failed.
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14186:handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_13_ROUND2_AUDIT_2026-04-29.md:4797:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R7.md:5277:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14187:handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_13_ROUND2_AUDIT_2026-04-29.md:4798:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R7.md:5278:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14240:handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_13_ROUND2_AUDIT_2026-04-29.md:5679:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:6795:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:27:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14241:handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_13_ROUND2_AUDIT_2026-04-29.md:5681:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:6840:handover/audits/A8_AUDIT_HISTORY_2026-04-26.md:318:- **Q2** (Gemini R11#3 — substantive refactor): `make_pput` signature `Option<u64>` → plain `u64` for the 3 affected parameters. All 9 production call sites + 4 test fixtures updated. `wc.elapsed_ms()` returns `Option<u64>` upstream; call sites add `.unwrap_or(0)` at the boundary. `cargo test --workspace`: 267 PASS (was 265 + 2 new boot tests).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14243:handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_13_ROUND2_AUDIT_2026-04-29.md:5746:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:9530:    43	| `cargo test --workspace` PASS | **267** | re-runnable; all suites green |
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14246:handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_13_ROUND2_AUDIT_2026-04-29.md:5749:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:9533:    46	| `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` | **16/16 PASS** | proxy routing + round-robin conformance (also wrapped by `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` so it runs every `cargo test --workspace`) |
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14247:handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_13_ROUND2_AUDIT_2026-04-29.md:5753:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:9546:   153	- (Q4.a) Spot-check: re-run `cargo test --workspace`; expect 267 PASS / 29 ignored / 0 failed.
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14248:handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_13_ROUND2_AUDIT_2026-04-29.md:5798:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R13.md:10039:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:5110:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14256:handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_13_ROUND2_AUDIT_2026-04-29.md:5841:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:10015:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:10339:handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:17:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14257:handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_13_ROUND2_AUDIT_2026-04-29.md:5876:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:10740:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:193:- (Q4.a) Spot-check: re-run `cargo test --workspace`; expect 265 PASS / 29 ignored / 0 failed.
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14258:handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_13_ROUND2_AUDIT_2026-04-29.md:5887:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:10932:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R9.md:5437:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).

handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14304:handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_13_ROUND2_AUDIT_2026-04-29.md:7953:./handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:26:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14305:handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_13_ROUND2_AUDIT_2026-04-29.md:7954:./handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v2_2026-04-25.md:27:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14347:handover/audits/EXTERNAL_AUDIT_PROMPT_TB_4_SHIP_TB_5_CHARTER_2026-04-30.md:162:cargo test --workspace 2>&1 | grep "^test result:" | awk '{p+=$4; f+=$6} END {print "PASS="p, "FAIL="f}'

handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14351:handover/audits/A8_AUDIT_HISTORY_2026-04-26.md:318:- **Q2** (Gemini R11#3 — substantive refactor): `make_pput` signature `Option<u64>` → plain `u64` for the 3 affected parameters. All 9 production call sites + 4 test fixtures updated. `wc.elapsed_ms()` returns `Option<u64>` upstream; call sites add `.unwrap_or(0)` at the boundary. `cargo test --workspace`: 267 PASS (was 265 + 2 new boot tests).

handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14355:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:86:| `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` | **16/16 PASS** | proxy routing + round-robin conformance (also wrapped by `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` so it runs every `cargo test --workspace`) |
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14357:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:193:- (Q4.a) Spot-check: re-run `cargo test --workspace`; expect 265 PASS / 29 ignored / 0 failed.
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14360:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:5461:- A8e2 (post-A8e, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-2 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini CHALLENGE — both convergent): three dual-audit fixes. **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1) `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` wraps `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` in a Rust integration test, making the V3L-27 round-robin conformance gate run on every `cargo test --workspace`. **G2** (Codex R2#2) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 8` audit-requirements paragraph reworded — round-1 fix corrected § 2 but left § 8 still calling the substitution a "strictest plausible bar"; now consistent across the doc. Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". FC-trace: meta governance + V3L-27 mitigation gating (FC1-N7). Trust Root manifest 33 → 34 (`tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`).
handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14361:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:5462:- A8e (post-A7, FIX-THEN-PROCEED after A8 round-1 audit Codex CHALLENGE / Gemini VETO): six dual-audit fixes. **F1** (Codex#2 + Gemini Q4) `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/run_id.rs` mints one stable run_id per run, threaded into both `emit_event` and `make_pput` (replaces `run_corr_id` vs internal `run_id` ms drift; oneshot also stops using `oneshot_{problem_file}` placeholder). **F2** (Gemini VETO Q6) `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` adds 15-test conformance battery — round-robin distributes [2,2,2] across 6 calls, single-key pool degrades to all-zero, two-key pool alternates [2,2]; exercises the V3L-27 mitigation without a live API. (A8e2 G1 wires this into `cargo test --workspace` via a Rust shell-out wrapper — see § 2 below.) **F3** (Codex#4) routing matrix bug fixed — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` was misrouting to DashScope because `m.startswith("qwen")` won after the slash check; now slash-form ⇒ siliconflow first, bare-qwen ⇒ dashscope second. **F4** (Codex#3) FC1-N12 emit added to all 3 swarm verify sites (`verify_omega_detailed` × 2 + `verify_partial`), each with verdict + elapsed_ms + path stamp; closes the swarm-side gap in the 5-step compile-loop witness. **F5** (Codex#5) `genesis_payload.toml` header + TRACE_MATRIX milestones reconciled to actual 31 entries (round-1 packet undercounted by 1 — agent_models.rs from A3 was already in TR before A1). **F6** (Codex#1) `PREREG_AMENDMENT § 2` wording corrected — `p_0=0.10` substitution is the LEAST-strict admissible ceiling (max tolerated value for `j-RR ≤ p_0`), NOT the strictest possible substitute as round-1 mistakenly claimed; explicit statistical-implications paragraph added (no Type-I inflation since `j-RR` is descriptive; substitution may be less protective than eventual calibrated `p_0 < 0.10`). FC-trace: FC1-N12 (oracle scope swarm coverage) + FC1-N7 (δ provider routing) + Art. V (amendment governance). Trust Root manifest 31 → 33 (run_id.rs + test_llm_proxy.py).

Re-hashed in Trust Root. **G3** (Codex R2#3 + Gemini R2#2) `A8_EXIT_PACKET` updated for round-2 reality: § 2 cumulative-tests table extended with A8e/A8e2 columns, § 4 manifest-clean assertion bumped 30→34, § 5 round-1 risk #5 (no FC1-N12 in swarm verify path) removed (closed by F4), § 6 Q7.a/b numbers updated, round-2 outcome + round-3 fixes section appended; TRACE_MATRIX stale `run_corr_id` symbol row replaced; "in CI" softened to "via Rust wrapper post-A8e2". handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14373:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:6601:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:88:- **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1, hardened by A8e3 H6): `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` — Rust integration test that shells to `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` + asserts exit 0 + checks for the unittest "OK" trailer. Now exercised on every `cargo test --workspace` (PASS in A8e2/A8e3 verification). The Python suite is no longer "manual only" — it runs whenever the Rust tests run, which is every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. **A8e3 H6 fail-closed**: missing `python3` is now a hard test failure (not a soft skip — Codex R3#3 caught the silent-pass risk). Explicit opt-out only via `SKIP_LLM_PROXY_PYTHON_CONFORMANCE=1` and the bypass is logged loudly. Closes the round-2 "recurring conformance gate" finding.

handover/audits/CODEX_STAGE_A3_R7_AUDIT_2026-05-08_R1.md:14384:handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:6690:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R5.md:8152:handover/audits/A8_EXIT_PACKET_2026-04-26.md:48:- **G1** (Codex R2#1 + Gemini R2#1, hardened by A8e3 H6): `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` — Rust integration test that shells to `python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py` + asserts exit 0 + checks for the unittest "OK" trailer. Now exercised on every `cargo test --workspace` (PASS in A8e2/A8e3 verification). The Python suite is no longer "manual only" — it runs whenever the Rust tests run, which is every commit that touches Rust + every CI pipeline that already exercises Rust tests. **A8e3 H6 fail-closed**: missing `python3` is now a hard test failure (not a soft skip — Codex R3#3 caught the silent-pass risk). Explicit opt-out only via `SKIP_LLM_PROXY_PYTHON_CONFORMANCE=1` and the bypass is logged loudly. Closes the round-2 "recurring conformance gate" finding.
